title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・お前は、

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... How... was that...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... All right! I'll give you my most charming
smile! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hah! As they should be. Who else deserves this
kind of attention?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Next up is my concert. Although, I'm still wiped...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess that's true. I did steal the spotlight
today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But remember, it'll take a lot more to satisfy me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When I say I'm going to be number one, I'm
aiming far higher than this.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Even when fall ends, winter passes, and I go from
the Classics to my senior year—my feelings will
never change.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
In the Osaka Hai next spring, the first
medium-length senior G1 race... I will outshine
everyone.
choice_data_list: I think that's a wonderful goal.
I think that's a wonderful goal.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, it's easier said than done. But I will make my dreams a reality!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, did you record my
performance today? I want to analyze it as soon
as we get back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Damn. The model student's on a whole 'nother
level, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka?! Why are you here? Shouldn't you be resting?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not supposed to race, sure, but I'm allowed to
go outside.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, there's something I wanna say. It's
about the way you ran today...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What about it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Man, it was a mess! You were all like "Huff, puff... I can't go ooon!"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ex-cuse me?! I was not! You're imagining things!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet? Pardon me, but the concert is just
about ready to start...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh! Right! I'm on my way!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Hurry up and clear out! This is my waiting room, you know!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. I hear you loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What am I doing? I came all this way and I
couldn't even say it. Man, I'm lame...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's only a few words, too. "You looked really cool
out there."
choice_data_list: Do you want me to tell her?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augh! Crap, you've been here the whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! Damn it! I'm outta here! And you better
not tell her what I said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka rushes out of the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to keep what she said a secret.
